---
title: "‘Neighbour’s Fare’ in Stories Jolly, Stories New, Stories Strange & Stories True: A Series of New and Original Tales for Boys and Girls from Six to Fourteen Years Old"
---

## ‘Neighbour’s Fare’ in Stories Jolly, Stories New, Stories Strange & Stories True: A Series of New and Original Tales for Boys and Girls from Six to Fourteen Years Old

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1889
**Genre:** Fiction
**Format:** Story in collection

**Publisher:** London: Skeffington & Son

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
